name: scaffolded IaC routes through the composite engine to one normalized per-file verdict
command: printf 'resource "aws_s3_bucket" "b" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'dispatch file=.* status=(green|red|incomplete) tools=[0-9]+' e.txt && echo routed-normalized-verdict 1>&2
